## Type

- [ ] Design note / docs
- [ ] Tooling / repo setup

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused — one concern
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or design changed
- [ ] If it adds a capability, it's reachable through the tool surface
      (agent-native parity), not human-only
